intro: The factory's salvage yard is heaped with reclaimed parts, worn gears, and gear that still has plenty of life left in it. A worker waves you toward the usable pile.
title: The Salvage Yard
description: A factory salvage yard piled with reclaimed parts and gear. Pick through the usable salvage for a curated held-item selection, or leave the scrap be.
query: Will you pick through the salvage?

1.label: Pick through the salvage
1.tooltip: (+) Pick one from a curated held-item selection
1.selected: You sort through the reclaimed parts and find some gear worth keeping...

2.label: Leave it be
2.selected: You leave the scrap to rust and move on.
